Info: Class of '92, OBE (2016). Was fined on several occasions, last in 2022 for lewd and offensive gestures.

He started the 2022/2023 season as a pro but then in August 2022 his WPBSA membership expired
He was one of a group of players known as the Magnificent Seven managed by Henry West, the others being Joe Johnson, Terry Whitthread, Patsy Fagan, John Virgo, Tony Knowles, and Tony Meo.
